If we don't use it then why beg other countries to help open it?
If we don't need it, then why send 2,500 troops to open it?
If we don't use it then why is it drastically affecting our gas prices at home?


Disclose.tv (@disclosetv)

NOW - Trump: "We don't use the Strait [of Hormuz], the United States, we don't need it."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/disclosetv/status/2035080075910001111#m

All because Republicans blocked a bill to fund TSA, FEMA, CISA, U.S. Coast Guard and countless other agencies.

Republicans control all 3 branches of government. They own this problem.


Breaking911 (@Breaking911)

🤯 TSA lines at LaGuardia International Airport in NYC stretching into hours-long waits due to the DHS shutdown.

🎥: @ScooterCasterNY

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Breaking911/status/2034974109864530181#m

Does this sound like someone who’s in control?
Our President is Putin’s easiest mark.
Fox: I'm really, really not happy about this inflation report. This does not look good to me. Prices were up by 3.11%. You're up 4.3% year-over-year.
MAGA, didn’t you think things would be better by now? What happened to “day one”?

Jerome Powell, President of the FED:

"Job gains have remained low. Inflation remains elevated"

"High inflation largely reflects the price of goods, mainly due to tariffs"  

"Short-term inflation expectations have risen in recent weeks due to the situation in the Middle East"
JD Vance is a political shapeshifter, but becoming a cheerleader for unpopular foreign wars might be too much for his facade to embrace. MAGA is cracking. Watch Rick on MSNOW:
At this point Trump will need to release all of the Epstein files in order to distract from this war in Iran.
When JD Vance sold his soul to MAGA he didn't think he was going to have to defend another reckless gulf war, and he's not sure he wants his name on this dumpster fire. Watch Rick on MSNOW.

As the "no new wars" president plunges us into another foreign war without a plan, Lt. Gen. Mark Hertling shares what war in the gulf is really like, and how messy this will get for Trump and Hegseth: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MsCbTnVP51c
Hassett: If the war were to be extended, it wouldn't really disrupt the U.S. economy very much at all. It would hurt consumers, but that's really the last of our concerns right now.
Trump and Hegseth are desperate to control the press right now. Too bad this isn't the dictatorship they wished it was. Watch Rick on MSNOW

ICYMI: You may not be able to afford gas or groceries but Trump and Kegsbreath don't care. They have schools to bomb and expensive dinners to enjoy. Watch The Breakdown here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nIaC_riI-RI

JD Vance in NC: "BBB is chock full of good things for this district and state"

(Big Beautiful Bill will cause 450,000 North Carolinians to lose health care coverage)

Trump's trigger-happy lawfare exposed his weakness: people talking about what he might've done with Epstein. Does he have the balls to sue now that he's scrambling to cover it all up? Watch the full episode on YouTube. Link in bio.
Pete Hegseth is destroying our military values and punishing those who call out his war crimes. This isn't who we are. Watch the full interview on YouTube through the link in bio.

You can’t win without a plan, and you can’t kill your way out of a war in the Middle East. Lt. General Mark Hertling joins the LP Pod to analyze the quagmire in Iran. Watch on YouTube through the link in bio.

Young men are starting to realize that politics isn't just a social media trend, and they're getting hurt. This is a major voting group which Dems should fight to win back this November. Watch The Breakdown on YouTube through the link in bio.
Trump's dismantling of our protections and squandering of resources is leaving us vulnerable, and at the worst possible time. Watch The Breakdown on YouTube through the link in our bio.

Republicans are now realizing there is no exit ramp from this war, because there was never supposed to be. Trump just wanted the distraction, and doesn’t care how many lives are lost. Watch the full episode through the link in bio.
Firing anyone who was prosecuting Trump was the first domino in this destruction of our law and order in Trump 2.0. Catch JP Cooney on the LP Podcast on our YouTube. Link in bio.
Policy debates will have to wait. Right now we need to save our democracy. Watch the full episode on the LP Podcast. Link in bio.
She had to have seen this one coming... Watch the full episode of The Breakdown at the link in our bio.
